user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee group, so that I can manage benefit-eligible cohorts such as ESI or Gratuity
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Group screen; When I click Add new group and provide a name and description; Then the group is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing group, so that I can update its description or eligibility notes
acceptance_criteria: Given a group is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated group is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view groups with their names and descriptions, so that I understand the purpose of each group
acceptance_criteria: Given groups exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows the group Name and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the group list, so that I always see the current set of groups
acceptance_criteria: Given the group list is displayed; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current groups
